queries.question: Give me the blues songs and folk songs where the singer's first name is John.
queries.sql:
SELECT Music.title 
FROM Music JOIN Singer ON Music.SINGER_id = Singer.id
WHERE (Music.title = "Blues Song" OR Music.title = "Folk Song") AND Singer.first_name = "John"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?music a :Music .
  ?singer a :Singer .
  ?music p:hasSinger ?singer .
  ?music p:title ?title .
  ?music p:title ?title_w .
  ?music p:title ?title_w2 .
  ?singer p:first_name ?first_name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?title_w) = "Blues Song" || STR(?title_w2) = "Folk Song")) && STR(?first_name_w) = "John"))
}

queries.question: Give me the blues songs and folk songs where the singer's first name is John.
queries.sql:
SELECT Music.title 
FROM Music JOIN Singer ON Music.SINGER_id = Singer.id
WHERE Music.title = "Blues Song" OR Music.title = "Folk Song" AND Singer.first_name = "John"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?music a :Music .
  ?singer a :Singer .
  ?music p:hasSinger ?singer .
  ?music p:title ?title .
  ?music p:title ?title_w .
  ?music p:title ?title_w2 .
  ?singer p:first_name ?first_name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?title_w) = "Blues Song" || (STR(?title_w2) = "Folk Song" && STR(?first_name_w) = "John")))
}
